chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 877 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 3826/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 19.06.2025. Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh. *********** Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has filed para-wise comments on behalf of respondent No.2, taken on record, copy whereof provided to learned counsel for petitioner. Learned counsel for petitioner under instructions does not wish to press this petition. Accordingly instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
